facts: Bananas are radioactive in high quantities
Humans share 60% DNA with bananas
Sharks existed before trees evolved
Octopuses have three hearts
A day on Venus is longer than its year
Honey never spoils and can last thousands of years
Water can boil and freeze at the same time under specific conditions
There are more possible chess games than atoms in the observable universe
Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins
Some turtles can breathe through their butt
Lightning strikes the Earth about 8 million times per day
Wombat poop is cube-shaped
Humans are the only animals with chins
The Eiffel Tower can grow more than 15 cm in summer due to heat expansion
A cloud can weigh more than a million pounds
Butterflies can taste with their feet
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance
Venus rotates backwards compared to most planets in the solar system
Hot water can freeze faster than cold water under certain conditions (Mpemba effect)
Bananas are technically berries, but strawberries are not
Neutron stars can spin up to 600 rotations per second
A bolt of lightning can reach temperatures hotter than the surface of the sun
The Eiffel Tower is slightly taller when the air is colder due to contraction
Some metals can become liquid at room temperature (like gallium)
Humans glow in the dark, but the light is too weak to see
Koalas have fingerprints that are almost indistinguishable from humans
The majority of Earth’s oxygen is produced by ocean plankton
There are more trees on Earth than stars in the Milky Way galaxy
Sharks can live for centuries, with some Greenland sharks reaching over 400 years
A teaspoon of neutron star material would weigh about a billion tons
Some jellyfish can potentially live forever under the right conditions
